---
title: "CV"
page-layout: full
---

# Kei Ikegami

Lecturer, Yokohama City University  
Email: ikegami.kei0120 [at] gmail.com  
Website: [keiikegami.github.io](https://keiikegami.github.io)

## Employment

- **Yokohama City University**, Lecturer, April 2026–present
- **New York University**, Teaching Assistant in Econometrics, 2021–2023
- **CyberAgent**, Research Intern, 2023
- **Center for Research and Education in Program Evaluation (CREPE)**, Trainee, 2018–2020
- **Preferred Networks**, Intern and Part-time Engineer, 2018–2019

## Education

- **PhD in Economics**, New York University, 2020–2025
- **MA in Economics**, The University of Tokyo, 2018–2020
- **BA in Economics**, The University of Tokyo, 2013–2018

## Research Fields

- Industrial Organization
- Econometrics
- Market Design
- Auctions and Matching

## Publications

- **Kei Ikegami**, [Kyohei Okumura](https://okuchap.github.io/), and Takumi Yoshikawa,  
  [A Simple, Fast, and Safe Mediator for Congestion Management](https://cdn.aaai.org/ojs/5575/5575-13-8800-1-10-20200512.pdf),  
  *AAAI 2020* (Oral and Poster presentation)

- **Kei Ikegami**, [Ken Onishi](https://sites.google.com/site/kenonishiecon/), and [Naoki Wakamori](https://sites.google.com/site/nwakamori/home),  
  [Competition-Driven Physician-Induced Demand](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0167629621000734?via%3Dihub),  
  *Journal of Health Economics*, Vol. 79, September 2021

## Working Papers

- **Procuring Hunting Effort: Structural Estimation and Optimal Contract Design**  
  New draft: March 17, 2026

- **Exposure Design for Two-Sided Platforms**  
  New draft: January 8, 2026

- **Bargaining over Leasing Contracts**  
  New draft coming soon

- **Evaluating the Efficiency of Regulation in Matching Markets with Distributional Disparities**  
  with Atsushi Iwasaki, Akira Matsushita, and Kyohei Okumura  
  New draft: July 7, 2025  
  Accepted for *EC 2025* (Exemplary Paper Award, Empirics Track)

- **Joint Venture Formation in Procurement Auctions**  
  with Ken Onishi and Naoki Wakamori  
  New draft: October 23, 2024

## Work in Progress

- **Wage Stagnation in Daycare Industry: A Two-Sided Market Perspective**  
  with Kan Kuno

## Selected Presentations

### Upcoming

- **IIOC 2026**, Boston, April 9–12, 2026
- **SSCW 2026**, Tokyo, June 13–16, 2026

### Recent

- **2025:** ESWC, EC 2025, HKUST(GZ), Penn State, IIOC
- **2024:** UTMD Rising Stars in Market Design, APIOC, JEMIOW, NYU seminars, AEA Annual Meeting
- **2023:** Yokohama National University, Otaru University of Commerce, JEMIOW, KCL (QPE Workshop), NYU Student Econometrics Lunch
- **2022:** APIOC, Waseda University Applied Econometrics Conference

## Teaching

### Current Courses

- Econometrics (Undergraduate), Yokohama City University
- Econometrics (Graduate), Yokohama City University

### Previous Teaching

- Econometrics (PhD), New York University
- Econometrics (MS in Quantitative Economics), New York University

## Honors and Fellowships

- MacCracken Fellowship, 2020–2025
- MITOU Advanced, 2019–2020
- CREPE Scholarship Program, 2018–2020
- Distinguished Graduation Thesis

## Skills

- **Programming:** Python, R, Julia, Stata
- **Languages:** Japanese (native), English (fluent)
- **Citizenship:** Japan
